title: C7: computeRevision excludes pending
description: Fix computeRevision to exclude pending/ directory nodes from revision_hash. Current implementation at rule-meta-builder.ts:309 KNOWLEDGE_SUBDIRS literal includes 'pending'; computeRevision (line 640-645) joins all nodes including pending. Required for rc.6 PreToolUse cache invalidation correctness — pending additions/modifications must NOT perturb revision_hash so session-hints cache (rc.6 E3) doesn't thrash. Anchor: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#code_anchors.rule-meta-builder.ts.

files.change: Exclude pending/ from hash input: filter nodes where path startsWith 'pending/' before hashing

implementation: Read rule-meta-builder.ts lines 280-330 and 630-660 to understand KNOWLEDGE_SUBDIRS shape and computeRevision body
Modify computeRevision: build sorted node list, filter out any node whose path starts with 'pending/' (or whose parent dir is pending), hash filtered list
Add unit test: build two meta objects identical except pending node count differs → revision_hash MUST be equal
Add unit test: approve pending → canonical move → revision_hash MUST change
Run existing rule-meta-builder tests to confirm no regression

reference.pattern: Deterministic hashing of canonical-only node set
reference.examples: Existing computeRevision already uses sha256(sortedNodesJson); just filter input

criteria: computeRevision in rule-meta-builder.ts excludes pending/ directory nodes
Adding/removing/rejecting a pending entry does NOT change revision_hash
Approving (which moves pending→canonical) does change revision_hash
Unit tests cover both cases and pass

rationale.chosen_approach: Filter at hash-input time (smallest blast radius)
alternatives_considered: Move pending out of KNOWLEDGE_SUBDIRS entirely
decision_factors: Minimal change to existing meta-builder pipeline
rationale.tradeoffs: Pending still appears in meta.json nodes record (for fab_review.list enumeration); only excluded from hash

success_metrics: 2 new unit tests pass; existing tests unchanged

risks.description: Existing callers depend on pending changing revision_hash
risks.mitigation: Grep revision_hash consumers; verify none rely on pending-perturbation

key_functions.purpose: Compute deterministic sha256 of canonical-only nodes
